# Martha Nussbaum

*1947 – ? · American*

American philosopher who, with Sen, developed the capabilities approach: a good life is measured by the real opportunities to act and to be that a person can actually choose.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
